supac_ss.name: SUPAC-SS: Nonsterile Semisolid Dosage Forms

level_1.description: Deletion or partial deletion of an ingredient intended to affect only the color, flavor, or fragrance, or change in supplier/grade of an excipient within registered specs

level_2.description: Change in technical grade of an excipient, change ≤5% w/w in inactive ingredient

level_3.description: Qualitative or quantitative change >5% in excipients, change in crystalline form of drug substance

level_1.description: Site change within same contiguous campus, same equipment, same SOPs

level_2.description: Site change to different campus, same city/region, similar equipment

level_3.description: Site change to different city/country, or significant equipment differences

level_1.description: Scale change up to and including 10x the size of the pilot/bio batch

level_2.description: Scale change beyond 10x the pilot/bio batch

level_1.description: Process changes within approved ranges, minor equipment adjustments

level_2.description: Change in process parameters beyond approved ranges, change in mixing/milling equipment of same design/operating principle

level_3.description: Change in process that may affect product microstructure, change to different equipment design/principle

supac_ss.multi_change_rule: When multiple changes are made simultaneously, the highest level change determines the overall filing requirement. Example: Level 2 (process) + Level 3 (formulation) = PAS filing.

supac_ir.name: SUPAC-IR: Immediate Release Solid Oral Dosage Forms
